title: geranium purpureum subsp. forsteri
intro: Geranium purpureum subsp. forsteri, also known as the Forster's Geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Geranium purpureum subsp. forsteri include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
